title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Preschool and afterschool programs also provided. 540 YMCA Way Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Facility: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 8am-5pm Pool: Monday-Friday 5:30am-8:30pm, Saturday 8am-5:30pm, Sunday 9am-4:30pm Email (541) 482-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 482-9622 Main phone Main phone (541) 482-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Program fees vary; family, youth, and senior memberships available. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID required if over age 18 LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Ashland, Phoenix, and Talent SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9pm, Saturday 8am-6pm, Sunday 9am-4pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - PRESCHOOL INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - AFTER SCHOOL CARE LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - DEBOER SUMMER CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - GYMNASTICS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SCHOOL’S OUT DAYS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SWIMMING LESSONS LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH SPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ASHLAND FAMILY YMCA
